name: service_ws_down
reason: WebSocket service down — operator should check

name: db_integrity_fail
reason: Database integrity check failed — manual intervention needed

name: dispatch_quality_low
reason: Dispatch quality degraded — analyzing logs for root cause

name: circuit_breaker_open
reason: Circuit breaker open — auto-resetting to restore routing

name: high_log_errors
pattern: High error rate in logs|ERROR.*CRITICAL.*last hour
reason: Elevated error rate in logs — running predictive analysis

name: node_m2_offline
reason: M2 reasoning node offline — dispatching to M3 fallback

name: vram_high_3080
reason: RTX 3080 VRAM >95% — consider unloading unused models
